refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital building are overflowing with waste. A person is walking by, seemingly unaffected by the issue.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was appalled to see the trash bins outside the building overflowing with garbage. This is not only an eyesore, but it also poses a health risk to patients and visitors. The hospital should take immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: There's trash all over the place outside the hospital, it's really gross. Someone should clean it up ASAP.
